title: Undo & Reset
description: Membatalkan perubahan, mengembalikan file, dan mereset commit.

commands.name: git restore
commands.title: Mengembalikan File
commands.description: Mengembalikan file ke versi terakhir yang di-commit atau staged.

options.description: Kembalikan working directory ke versi staged/committed

commands.examples:
git restore file.txt
git restore .
git restore --staged file.txt
git restore --source=HEAD~2 file.txt
git restore --source=main -- src/App.tsx
commands.notes: git restore menggantikan fungsi git checkout -- file.

commands.name: git reset
commands.title: Mereset ke Commit Sebelumnya
commands.description: Memindahkan HEAD dan opsional mereset staging/working directory.

options.description: Pindah HEAD saja, staging & working tetap
Pindah HEAD + reset staging + reset working

commands.examples:
# Unstage file
git reset file.txt

# Undo commit terakhir, simpan perubahan di staging
git reset --soft HEAD~1

# Undo commit terakhir, simpan perubahan di working
git reset --mixed HEAD~1

# Hapus commit terakhir sepenuhnya
git reset --hard HEAD~1

# Reset ke commit tertentu
git reset --hard abc1234
commands.warning: git reset --hard menghapus perubahan SECARA PERMANEN! Gunakan git stash dulu.

commands.name: git revert
commands.title: Membatalkan Commit (Aman)
commands.description: Membuat commit baru yang membatalkan perubahan dari commit tertentu. Aman untuk shared branch.
commands.examples:
git revert HEAD
git revert abc1234
git revert HEAD~3..HEAD  # revert 3 commit terakhir
git revert --no-commit HEAD~2..HEAD  # revert tapi jangan commit dulu
commands.notes: Gunakan revert (bukan reset) untuk membatalkan commit yang sudah di-push.
